items.title: Whistleblower murder suspect is former elite officer, South African police say
items.dek: Marius van der Merwe was shot dead three weeks after accusing police officers of killing a robbery suspect.
items.body: Marius van der Merwe was shot dead three weeks after accusing police officers of killing a robbery suspect.

items.title: Who wants what from the Iran war?
items.dek: Most people, although not everybody, want this war to end as quickly as possible. But on what terms?
items.body: Most people, although not everybody, want this war to end as quickly as possible. But on what terms?

items.title: Far-left and far-right gains throw French mainstream parties into a quandary
items.dek: Awkward choices emerge for mainstream parties after the first round of mayoral elections.
